General.Name: Hidili Industry International Development Limited
General.Description: Hidili Industry International Development Limited, an investment holding company engages in the sale of raw and clean coal in the People's Republic of China. It also involved in the coal mining, mine holding, and development; and provides clean coal washing services. In addition, the company offers by-products of high-ash thermal coal. Hidili Industry International Development Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Panzhihua, the People's Republic of China.

2.Name: Mr. Xianwei  Zhuang
2.Title: GM of Coal Mines & Executive Director
